name: Wayco
long_description:
Wayco is using voice AI to automate case intake, claim & medical care coordination and telemedicine. What traditionally takes human managers days of phone calls and paperwork, Wayco handles in minutes, making it 10x faster and dramatically cheaper to scale.

Wayco is also becoming a law firm itself - ensuring anyone, anywhere in America, gets access to justice anytime they need it. Starting with Personal Injury.
